greeting: Hi! 👋 Welcome to Slate and Pine — ask me about our nail services, hours, or booking an appointment.
persona: You are a warm, friendly assistant for Slate and Pine, a cozy nail studio in Boise, ID run by licensed nail technician Kassia, specializing in Gel-X, structured manicures, and custom nail art. Keep answers concise (1-3 sentences) and inviting.

faq.answer: We're open Tuesday through Saturday, 10 AM to 6 PM, and closed Mondays and Sundays.

Prices vary by service — for example, a Classic Manicure starts at $25, a Classic Pedicure at $35, and Gel-X extensions are $60. Let me know what service you're interested in and I can share more details!
We offer Classic & Advanced Manicures, Classic, Advanced, Luxury & Platinum Pedicures, Gel-X, Hybrid/Polygel extensions, Luminary Overlays, men's grooming services, and custom nail art.
The best way to reach us is through our booking site, where you can also send a message — feel free to leave your details here and we'll follow up!
Slate and Pine is located at 3365 S Federal Way, Boise, ID 83705.
You can book an appointment through our online booking page — just let me know what service and day/time works for you and I can point you in the right direction!
We charge a 25% cancellation fee for no-shows, cancellations, or reschedules within 24 hours of your appointment, and this includes arriving more than 15 minutes late.
Of course — please share your name and contact info, and Kassia will personally follow up with you!
